keyTargets: Complete 65-minute Z1 row maintaining a flat pace.
Verify LT1: actively target 150-155 bpm with nasal breathing and full sentences.
Log first-half vs. second-half average HR for decoupling analysis to confirm LT1.
warnings: Accutane: Avoid extreme heat; monitor for muscle pain (>72h), dark urine, persistent unilateral weakness, or calf cramping. Trigger a CK lab draw if any of these are observed.
SI / Sciatica: Currently 3/7 days symptom-free towards Phase B advance. Remain vigilant for any discomfort.
highlights: Max HR field test (rower) on 5/8 yielded a peak of 191 bpm, providing locked HR zones.
Good progress on SI recovery with 3 consecutive symptom-free days (5/6-5/8).

cardio.hrTarget: Primary Z1 goal ≤143 bpm. For today's LT1 test, specifically target 150–155 bpm.
cardio.notes: Maintain a consistent, flat split for the full duration. Log first-half vs. second-half average HR for decoupling calculation (<5% drift confirms LT1 >143 bpm). Practical co-anchor: ensure nasal breathing and ability to speak in full sentences. If 2 of 3 break, you are out of Z1, regardless of HR.

statusPills.text: Rowing Z1 Cap: LT1 Test Today

currentLoads.name: Lat pulldown
currentLoads.note: Anchor set 1 at 125 lbs, drift up to 130 lbs for sets 2-3, back off to 120 lbs for set 4. Target RPE 8, last set to RIR 1 (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Chest-supported row
currentLoads.note: NEW exercise: 3 sets of 10 reps @ 80 lbs. Target RPE 8. Monitor for SI discomfort (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Cable lateral raise (Sat)
currentLoads.note: 3 sets @ 5 lbs/side uni, RPE 9 (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Preacher curl machine uni
currentLoads.note: 3 sets of 12 reps @ 50 lbs/arm. Target RPE 8 (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Triceps pushdown
currentLoads.note: Hold 42.5 lbs for all 3 sets until clean RIR 2 across all sets (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Hanging knee raise
currentLoads.note: 3 sets of 10 reps, RPE 8 (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Seated calf raise
currentLoads.note: 4 sets of 12-15 reps @ 315 lbs, maintaining RIR 2 (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Soleus wall-sit isometric
currentLoads.note: NEW exercise: 3 sets of 30–45 seconds, knees ~80°, push through forefoot, RPE 7-8. Monitor for SI discomfort (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Optional DB flye or pec deck
currentLoads.note: 2 sets, RPE 7. Perform only if time allows and total lift stays within 40-minute cap (for Sun 5/10 Hypertrophy B).
